series_metadata.series_title: Disabled Veteran/Former Prisoner of War Correspondence
series_metadata.series_description: Correspondence received in the Gratis Unit from disabled veteran (DV) applicants and former prisoner of war (POW) applicants interested in obtaining grants toward the purchase of a motor vehicle, seeking eligibility for gratis plates, regarding returned replacement notices, out of state notices, deceased notices, etc. Correspondence is filed on site by applicants name. Distribution: Original correspondence is filed with the application.
